prestazioni: Engine swap to a Mitsubishi 4G63T (from the Galant VR-4 or Evo I-III) with a forged internals build featuring Manley 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a Tomei 272° camshaft kit for high-RPM power delivery. Pair with a Garrett GT3076R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power with a 200-cell catalytic converter for JDM compliance.

Custom ECU tuning via Haltech Elite 2500 standalone unit with flex-fuel capability, mapped for 98 RON and E85 blends. Include a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller and a Tomei Type-S blow-off valve for precise turbo response. Upgrade the fuel system with a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump, Injector Dynamics ID1000 fuel injectors, and a custom fuel rail by Tomei.

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valved for the Celeste’s 2,440mm wheelbase) and polyurethane bushings by SuperPro (part #SPF0115K). Reinforce the chassis with a Cusco front strut tower bar (part #601 390 A) and a rear subframe brace by J's Racing. Upgrade braking with Endless CC-R6 rotors (280mm front, 260mm rear) and AP Racing CP5556-260N calipers with Ferodo DS2500 pads.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny PB-CE-01 widebody kit (fiberglass fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser) with custom carbon fiber side skirts and a ducktail spoiler by Vertex. Paint in Mitsubishi’s original ‘Lime Green’ (code 447) with a matte black roof and gold accents on the fender flares.

Custom 15x8-inch SSR Mk3 wheels (ET+15 offset) wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (195/50R15). Use custom wheel spacers by 5Zigen (15mm front, 20mm rear) to fill the widebody arches. Add a custom front lip by Garage Vary and a rear diffuser by C-West.

Interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III seats (JDM-spec, black Alcantara with lime green stitching), a Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel, and a custom roll cage by AutoPower (4-point bolt-in, powder-coated in gold). Replace the stock gauges with a Defi Advance BF series 6-gauge cluster (oil pressure, boost, water temp, fuel pressure, AFR, and EGT).
